title: dispatch input
description: A wave of brief ids plus the design directory the assemble_wave activity reads, and every shared child parameter and the halt_on_failure flag. Every value is required — the caller states each cap, deadline, and halt_on_failure; nothing is assumed (ADR-001). There is deliberately no concurrency-limit field: delivery is serial-only until parent-close (RM-001/ADR-004) lands.

design_dir.description: Directory holding roadmap.json, decisions.json, and the cluster documents the assemble_wave activity resolves against.

wave.description: The wave as an ordered list of brief ids; assemble_wave orders by depends_on, preserving this order among independents.

workspace_id.description: Meridian workspace UUID for norn activity dispatch.
